# llms.txt - Jaime Hernández - AI Agents Engineer

# Site Information
site-title: Jaime Hernández - AI Agents Engineer & Software Developer
site-url: https://jaimehernandez.dev
description: AI Agents Engineer especializado en LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI y MCP. Building autonomous AI systems, intelligent automation workflows, and multi-agent orchestration for enterprises and startups in Latin America.

# Expertise
expertise:
  - AI Agents (Inteligencia Artificial Agéntica)
  - Autonomous AI Systems
  - Multi-Agent Orchestration
  - LangChain / LangGraph
  - CrewAI
  - MCP (Model Context Protocol)
  - RAG Systems (Retrieval Augmented Generation)
  - Vector Databases / pgvector
  - AI Workflow Automation
  - n8n Automation
  - Backend Development (Go, Python)
  - Cloud Architecture (GCP, AWS)

# AI Agents Specialization
ai-agents:
  description: "Especialización en construir sistemas de IA donde agentes autónomos trabajan para completar tareas complejas"
